meta.name: Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Protective cover for buttons and switches
meta.heroTitle: Dome IP54 Protective Cover with Optional Sounder
meta.heroDescription:
Dome polycarbonate cover for manual call points, emergency buttons, pull stations and electrical devices. IP54-rated mounting options for protection against physical damage, dust and moisture ingress.
Available with optional label hood, sounder with relay, and multiple colour options including custom labelling. Flush, surface and colour-matched frame mounting.
Designed for indoor and outdoor installations requiring robust device protection against tampering, vandalism and accidental activation.

options.2: #2 Surface Mount with Matching Coloured Frame

options.30: #30 Label Hood with Sounder and Relay
